extension.summary: Build chooser, guided setup wizard, maintenance tools, and update manager for SoLoKodi builds.
extension.description: Pick your SoLoKodi build (Kids, SoLoTV, and more) from a visual chooser, then run a guided wizard. Includes maintenance tools (clear cache, packages, thumbnails, reset build), Real-Debrid setup, and build update checks.
extension.news: v0.5.6 - Add Kids Trakt list setup, brighter Kids branding, and refreshed Kids home menus.

extension.summary: Kids movies and shows through Real-Debrid.
extension.description: Browse kids and family content with TMDb and curated Trakt lists, play from your Real-Debrid library, and stream cached titles when available. Uses Real-Debrid and Trakt authorization from SoLoKodi Kids Setup. v0.2.4 adds family-friendly Trakt list browsing.

extension.summary: SoLoKodi builds — Kids, SoLoTV, and more.
extension.description: The SoLoKodi repository ships setup wizards, update managers, and build-specific add-ons. Install once, pick Kids or SoLoTV, and use the wizard to stay current.
Movies, TV, live channels, and Real-Debrid addons for the SoLoTV Kodi build. Maintained by SoLoVision.
